title: File not found in production for Read/Write Files node
symptom: The Read/Write Files from Disk node works in test mode but fails in production, returning no data or errors related to missing files.
applies_when: Using Read/Write Files from Disk node
Running n8n in a multi-container setup
not_this_if: Running n8n in a single container
root_cause: In a multi-container setup, if the containers do not share the same file system or volumes, the Read/Write Files node may not find the files it needs when executed in production, leading to 'file not found' errors.
fix_steps: Ensure all n8n containers are configured to mount the same volumes
Verify that the file paths used in the Read/Write Files node are consistent across all containers
Test the workflow again in production
agent_instruction: Configure shared volumes for all n8n containers to ensure file accessibility.
